name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_liner: Lark (Larksuite) is ByteDance's international all-in-one collaboration suite (messaging, docs, Base, calendar, video, approvals) with a broad Open Platform API for building apps and bots.
primary_auth: OAuth2 (user_access_token via OAuth) plus app-credential tokens (app_access_token / tenant_access_token) minted from App ID + App Secret
access_notes: Anyone can register a developer account and create a custom app on the Open Platform for free to obtain App ID and App Secret, then mint tenant_access_token/app_access_token immediately. No payment or human approval is required to start calling APIs; publishing a store app or granting certain sensitive scopes may require admin approval, but development credentials are self-serve.
api_notes: Extensive Server API covering IM/messages, groups, contacts/HR, Docs & Wiki, Base (Bitable), Sheets, Drive, Calendar, VC, Approval, Attendance, and more (100+ endpoints). Official SDKs (Node, Python, Go, Java) and an official OpenAPI MCP tool. Auth tokens passed in HTTP Authorization header.
mcp_notes: Vendor ships an official OpenAPI MCP server: larksuite/lark-openapi-mcp on GitHub, published as npm package @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp. Wraps Lark OpenAPI as MCP tools (messages, groups, calendar, Base, docs), supports tenant_access_token and user_access_token, configurable to open.larksuite.com for the international version.
main_blocker: None for development: self-serve free app creation gives working credentials. Minor friction is that certain API scopes and app publication require workspace-admin approval.

evidence.claim: Lark documents app_access_token and tenant_access_token; custom apps mint tenant_access_token from app credentials, passed in the HTTP Authorization header.
user_access_token is obtained via OAuth/OIDC flow for acting on behalf of a user.
Official Lark OpenAPI MCP tool is maintained by the larksuite GitHub org, wrapping OpenAPI endpoints (messages, groups, calendars, Base) as MCP tools.
Official MCP is published as npm package @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp.

open_questions: Exact list of scopes that require admin approval vs. self-serve was not enumerated; store-app publication review process not deeply verified.
